overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing nighttime driving starting at Del Perro Pier, passing under the neon entrance archway, and continuing through urban streets with moderate traffic and intersections.

wooden plank surface of the pier parking area

dome-topped tower structure of the pier building
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through the wooden parking lot of Del Perro Pier at night, with the distinctive Mediterranean-style pier building visible to the left and scattered parked cars around the area.

events.description: colorful amusement park lights become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: driving along the wooden pier toward the lit amusement area and entrance arch

notable_agents.action: walking along the right side of the pier boardwalk

entered.detail: colorful neon lights from the pier amusement rides
large purple neon archway marking the pier entrance

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the wooden boardwalk, the vehicle approaches the pier's amusement area with vibrant ride lights and the illuminated Del Perro Pier arch becoming prominent in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier causeway road exiting to city

events.description: surface changes from wooden boardwalk to asphalt road with stop sign markings
passing under the large purple Del Perro Pier neon archway

agents.ego_description: driving along the pier road and passing under the exit archway toward the city

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on the sidewalk along the railing

entered.detail: paved asphalt surface replacing the wooden planks
metal safety railings along the sides of the pier road

building with distinctive green neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from wooden planks to asphalt along the pier causeway, passing safety railings and approaching the illuminated Del Perro Pier arch before exiting to the city streets.

events.description: stopping at red traffic light at intersection waiting for other vehicles
proceeding through green light and navigating the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through city intersections with other traffic and pedestrians

white car driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: urban road intersection with crosswalk markings
multi-story commercial buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Entering the urban grid, the vehicle navigates through city intersections with traffic lights, crosswalks, and other vehicles, surrounded by commercial buildings and street lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from the rustic, wooden atmosphere of a seaside pier into the brightly lit urban grid of the city. It begins by navigating a wooden parking lot at night, passing a Mediterranean-style building and scattered parked cars. As the vehicle continues along the boardwalk, the environment shifts toward the amusement area, where vibrant ride lights lead the way toward the illuminated Del Perro Pier arch. The scene then transitions from wooden planks to asphalt along the pier causeway, passing safety railings before gliding under the archway and exiting the pier. Finally, the camera enters the city streets, moving through intersections with traffic lights and crosswalks amidst a landscape of commercial buildings and street lighting.
